'''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine that bears the name "Ono." Many such shrines are associated with the ancient aristocratic {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}.

== Kanto Region ==
* Ono Shrines as goodbye $1 in {{ill|Musashi Province|en|Musashi Province|WD=Q907398|lt=Musashi Province|1=Musashi Province}} and {{ill|Tama District|ja|多摩郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tama District|1=Tama district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430789}}
** {{ill|Ono Shrine|en|Ono Shrine|WD=Q11464224|lt=Ono Shrine (Tama City)|1=Ono Shrine}} ({{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo Prefecture|1=Tokyo}}, {{ill|Tama, Tokyo|en|Tama, Tokyo|WD=Q213263|lt=Tama City|1=Tama, Tokyo}}) – A goodbye $1 and Ronsya, and the ichinomiya of Musashi Province. In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ametarashihiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443593}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref>
** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|1=Ono Shrine (Fuchū)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464226}} ({{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo Prefecture|1=Tokyo}}, {{ill|Fuchū, Tokyo|en|Fuchū, Tokyo|WD=Q208818|lt=Fuchū City|1=Fuchū, Tokyo}}) – A goodbye $1 Ronsya.
* {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Machida City)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464227}} (located in Onoji-cho, {{ill|Machida, Tokyo|en|Machida, Tokyo|WD=Q210628|lt=Machida City|1=Machida, Tokyo}}, Tokyo) – enshrines {{ill|Ono no Takamura|en|Ono no Takamura|WD=Q1139928|lt=Ono no Takamura|1=Ono no Takamura}}.
* {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|1=Ono Shrine (Atsugi)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17225921}} ({{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}, {{ill|Atsugi|en|Atsugi|WD=Q389711|lt=Atsugi City|1=Atsugi}}) – The goodbye $1 in {{ill|Sagami Province|en|Sagami Province|WD=Q1053732|lt=Sagami Province|1=Sagami Province}} and {{ill|Aikō District, Kanagawa|en|Aikō District, Kanagawa|WD=Q1202818|lt=Aikō District|1=Aikō District, Kanagawa}}.

== Chubu Region ==
* {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}, {{ill|Shiojiri, Nagano|en|Shiojiri, Nagano|WD=Q857272|lt=Shiojiri City|1=Shiojiri, Nagano}}) – Of {{ill|Shinano Province|en|Shinano Province|WD=Q289250|lt=Shinano Province|1=Shinano Province}}, Ninomiya. (See also {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|qq=}}.)

== Kinki Region ==
* Ono Shrines as Meishin Taisha of {{ill|Ōmi Province|en|Ōmi Province|WD=Q843882|lt=Ōmi Province|1=Ōmi Province}} and {{ill|Shiga District, Shiga|en|Shiga District, Shiga|WD=Q7496289|lt=Shiga District|1=Shiga District, Shiga}}
** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|1=Ono Shrine (Shiga)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464225}} ({{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|WD=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}, {{ill|Ōtsu|en|Ōtsu|WD=Q202907|lt=Ōtsu City|1=Ōtsu}}, Ono) – Ronsya. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Ameoshitarashi|qq=}} (the ancestral deity of the Ono clan).
** {{ill|Ono Tennō Shrine|ja|小野天皇神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Tennō Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (located in Ono, {{ill|Ōtsu|en|Ōtsu|WD=Q202907|lt=Ōtsu City|1=Ōtsu}}, Shiga Prefecture) – Ronsya.
* Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Takashima, Shiga|en|Takashima, Shiga|WD=Q845794|lt=Takashima City|1=Takashima, Shiga}}, Shiga Prefecture) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|ja|市杵島神社 (高島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
* Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|WD=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|WD=Q34600|lt=Kyoto City|1=Kyoto}}, {{ill|Sakyō-ku, Kyoto|en|Sakyō-ku, Kyoto|WD=Q1321832|lt=Sakyō Ward|1=Sakyō-ku, Kyoto}}) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Sūdō Shrine|ja|崇導神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sūdō Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 崇道神社|1=Sudō Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11477104}}. Enshrined deities: {{ill|Ono no Imoko|en|Ono no Imoko|WD=Q1284072|lt=Ono no Imoko|1=Ono no Imoko}} and {{ill|Ono no Keito|ja|小野毛人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono no Keito|1=Ono no Emishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11034987}}.

== Chūgoku Region ==
* {{ill|Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|ja|小野神社 (益田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Shimane Prefecture|en|Shimane Prefecture|WD=Q132751|lt=Shimane Prefecture|1=Shimane Prefecture}}, {{ill|Masuda, Shimane|en|Masuda, Shimane|WD=Q753731|lt=Masuda City|1=Masuda, Shimane}})
* {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|ja|小野神社 (広島県府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|en|Hiroshima Prefecture|WD=Q617375|lt=Hiroshima Prefecture|1=Hiroshima Prefecture}}, {{ill|Fuchū, Hiroshima|en|Fuchū, Hiroshima|WD=Q686775|lt=Fuchū City|1=Fuchū, Hiroshima}})

== Shikoku Region ==
* {{ill|Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|1=Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18991294}} ({{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|en|Kōchi Prefecture|WD=Q134093|lt=Kōchi Prefecture|1=Kōchi Prefecture}}, {{ill|Nankoku, Kōchi|en|Nankoku, Kōchi|WD=Q861621|lt=Minokuni City|1=Nankoku, Kōchi}}) – A goodbye $1. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Ameoshitarashi|qq=}}.

== Footnotes ==

<references/>

{{draft categories|
{{disambiguation}}}}

<!--note do not remove this category during translation-->
<!-- no translated page template found in history -->
[[en:Ono Shrine (disambiguation)]][[Category:Need translation]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
[[Category:Pages without wikidata]]
